data.current_description: Returns count of related domains across all supported lookup fields
data.description_suggestion: Returns the count of related domains discovered across all supported lookup fields (such as IP address, nameserver, and mail server associations). Useful for understanding domain relationships and network associations. Returns a RelatedDomains object containing counts for each relationship type.

data.current_description: Returns combined data from web, DNS, related endpoints plus IPinfo geolocation
data.description_suggestion: Returns comprehensive domain intelligence by combining web metadata, DNS records, related domains, and geolocation data from IPinfo. This consolidated endpoint provides a complete profile of a domain including its hosting location, DNS configuration, associated domains, and scraped website metadata. Returns a FullDomainInfo object containing all integrated data.

data.current_description: Lists all domains matching a specific field-value pair
data.description_suggestion: Searches and returns all domains matching a specified field-value pair. Supported search fields include IP address, nameserver, mail server, and other domain attributes. Accepts pagination parameters (limit, offset) to control result set size. Returns a DomainList object containing matching domains and pagination metadata. Useful for discovering related domains or infrastructure analysis.
